published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML / ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO / ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: fixed-overlap orthogonal-score common-EIF inference

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md ExactID/PartialID empty; eid_bjs_efficient_event_study is panel/event-study IF frontier, not ExactID ATE weak-overlap studentization

published_prior_art.cite: Dorn2025WeakOverlapTStats / Rothe2017LimitedOverlapCI / ArmstrongKolesar2021ATE / HeilerKazak2021ExtremePS: weak-overlap ATE inference but no DML/LRO/ADML iff studentization frontier
BrunsSmithDukesFellerOgburn2024ABW: augmented balancing/AutoDML linear-regression equivalence, not a primitive weak-overlap three-studentization witness

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest weak-overlap DR estimator prior art should include Ma, Sant'Anna, Sasaki, and Ura, 'Doubly Robust Estimators with Weak Overlap' (arXiv:2304.08974, revised 2026), which directly studies DR estimators under weak overlap even though it does not subsume the three-studentization frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed convergence |T_m-T_A| => |Z_mA| is not well-posed below the boundary because Var(Z_mA) is stated as asymp a_n^2 s_mA,n^2, which can diverge when r_g+r_alpha+zeta < (1+omega)/2; split the boundary case from the divergent-separation case or rescale the local limit.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: S_n is advertised as an observable diagnostic, but h_{m,n} are only existential variance-residual functions and are not defined from the DML/LRO/ADML variance estimators; the proposal needs estimator-level formulas or a locked construction of h_{D,n}, h_{L,n}, and h_{A,n}.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Ma--Sant'Anna--Sasaki--Ura as a direct weak-overlap DR comparison and state explicitly why its bias-corrected trimmed DR class does not imply the DML/LRO/ADML studentization frontier.

Replace the single non-equivalence clause in Conjecture 1 with two regimes: boundary/local alternatives with finite nonzero a_n s_mA,n limit, and strict-below-boundary alternatives where |T_m-T_A| diverges or requires an explicit rescaling.
Define h_{D,n}, h_{L,n}, and h_{A,n} from the three named variance estimators in the setup, then define S_n as a computable population target and its sample plug-in analogue.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjecture 1's local-limit statement and observable S_n construction, then add the missed weak-overlap DR prior-art comparison.
